title: +staff — live demo
description: Online-staff roster: empty state and populated state, visible to staff and players alike.

steps.note: +staff lists every connected, non-dark admin/wizard/superuser. With no staff online, the panel still frames cleanly via an empty-state row.
Each row shows the staff member's display name, on-for, idle, and doing line — colour-coded by idle bucket.
+staff is not staff-locked — any connected player can check who is on duty.
